calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Vacated

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Gwire and Bruce Glassner of Gwire Law Offices telephone number 415-296-8880 for Plaintiff Lynette Lange.
Timothy Halloran of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendants Sucherman & Insalaco, Lowell Sucherman and Michelene Insalaco.

The request to continue the motion is denied. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTS SUCHERMAN & INSALACO, LOWELL SUCHERMAN and MICHELENE INSALACO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The defendants are entitled to summary judgment because they've met their burden in demonstrating that plaintiff cannot establish all the elements of her negligence cause of action. To establish breach of duty, plaintiff must rely on mediation negotiations to prove that defendants negligently negotiated, prepared, reviewed, approved, and caused her to execute the settlement agreement at the mediation, and such communications are inadmissible under California's Mediation Confidentiality Statutes.
The Court issued rulings on the objections on the record. Mr. Halloran is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: John Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Gwire and Bruce Glassner of Gwire Law Offices telephone number 415-296-8880 for Plaintiff Lynette Lange.
Timothy Halloran of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendants Sucherman & Insalaco, Lowell Sucherman and Michelene Insalaco.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF LYNETTE LANGE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT is denied. Leave to amend is properly denied when the facts are undisputed. And as a substantive matter, no liability exists under the plaintiff's new theory. Mr. Halloran is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: John Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Off Calendar Oct-13-2015 Continued To Oct-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Gwire of Gwire Law Offices telephone number 415-296-8880 for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Blute of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendants.

The parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matters were argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows:

1) Defendants Sucherman And Insalaco, Lowell Sucherman and Michelene Insalacos' Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Production Of Documents is granted subject to terms and conditions. The request for sanctions is denied.

2) PLAINTIFF LYNETTE LANGE'S Motion For Protective Order is denied.

Counsel are to jointly prepare two separate orders. Both matters are continued to October 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302 for review of the proposed orders.
